case_title: ISAIAS MARTINEZ-PEREZ VS. CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS INC et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-27-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AGREES TO ACCEPT $800 TP RESOLVE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DAMIAN PRIM WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DAMIAN PRIM. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--STEPHANIE SEQUIRA. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RAY GUTIERREZ--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:IRVIN HOLMES) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ-PEREZ, ISAIAS AS TO DEFENDANT CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS INC
